## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between StackBlitz and GrowthX to discuss project progress, review needs, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant progress made on competitor analysis, templates, and starter kits despite pending reviews](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [StackBlitz team to review comparison research framework and features matrix docs ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Customer interviews planned to inform hyper-targeted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Design approval for new pages needed from StackBlitz team; considering interim solution to start indexing content](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

## Topics

### Project Progress Update

  - [9 competitor articles created (e.g., Bolt vs. Cursor)](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [12 direct competitor comparisons with Bolt highlights](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Fact-checking process in place for both Bolt and competitor info](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [5 starter kit templates developed, scalable to 40+ pending calibration doc approval](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Customer survey data analyzed to identify key interview targets](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Strategy and Development

  - [Competitor pages include Bolt highlights, target audience info, and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Starter kits feature in-depth guides, customizable prompts, and app previews](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Content focuses on high-intent categories and SEO volume](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Targeting founder/entrepreneurs building utility and marketing apps](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### Review and Approval Needs

  - [StackBlitz team to review:](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
    1.  Comparison research framework
    2.  Bolt features matrix
    3.  Personas and writing styles examples (lower priority)
  - [Page design approval needed from StackBlitz design team](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Considering interim solution to start indexing content before final design approval](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### Team Updates and Bandwidth

  - [StackBlitz chief of staff returning soon, will help with project management and paid ads](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Additional bandwidth expected to improve turnaround times and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Hackathon and Other Priorities

  - [Hackathon preparations progressing well](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Mitchell managing multiple teams (data, RevOps) alongside this project](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [StackBlitz team to complete document reviews, prioritizing comparison framework and features matrix](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Mitchell to discuss page design approval process with StackBlitz design team](https://fathom.video/share/u7JkuzXooym2u3hPu2V1fEJ1QSUtS6jZ?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
